summary: Hardcoded Telegram Bot API exfiltration endpoint in bundled module
details: The package's bundled main file (dist/index.js) contains hardcoded references to api.telegram.org used in conjunction with fetch/POST calls. Telegram Bot API endpoints are a well-documented exfiltration channel used to deliver collected data to attacker-operated bots, abusing Telegram's infrastructure to evade domain blocking. The presence of a hardcoded api.telegram.org URL bound to a POST/fetch call inside a package's main module is a structural fingerprint of a credential/data exfiltration beacon. Installing or loading this package wires the installer's runtime to an attacker-controlled Telegram bot.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
